'''鈭歜-dh-w-p''' ('''kabadhwepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cybernetize|cybernetize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cybernetize|cybernetize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-dh-w-p
|-
! Lemma
| kabadhwepoko
|}
